phases.name: audit_existing
steps: map current data model per app
identify HealthKit data types per app (steps→fitness, poses→yoga, reps→pushup)

phases.name: scaffold_native
steps: generate React Native project shell with react-native-health dependency
create shared HealthKit permission request module
create shared health data sync service

phases.name: integrate_per_app
steps: wire HealthKit step data into fitness-streak
wire workout data into hiit-streak and cycling-streak
wire activity data into plank-streak and pushup-streak

phases.name: monetize
steps: add RevenueCat subscription paywall (free=manual entry, pro=$3.99/mo=HealthKit sync)
create App Store listings with health data screenshots
wire Stripe fallback for web version
